headline: Assessing Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation As Profit Growth Meets Mixed Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Fortinet (FTNT) is back in focus after recent trading saw the cybersecurity stock move, while delivering annual revenue of US$6.8b and net income of US$1.9b, putting profitability and scale front and center for investors. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. At a share price of US$81.84, Fortinet has seen a 6.7% 7 day share price return and an 8.6% 90 day share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return is a 14.9% decline and the 5 year total shareholder return is 102.8%. This...
